_comment: Tracked weapon ornaments whose ONLY source is Eververse (Tess Everis). These can't be 'earned' from an activity, so we don't list a static acquisition path for them; instead the /eververse live read checks whether each is currently for sale in the shop and, if so, surfaces it (with its Bright Dust / Silver cost) so the user can go buy it before it rotates out. Keyed by itemHash; verified against the Manifest collectible sourceString 'Source: Eververse'. Keep this file byte-identical with src/data/ornaments.json.
